availabilityMessage: We are currently accepting registrations for 2027.
footerBusinessCopy: Little Wise Kids provides nurturing, child-led early years education in a home-from-home setting in Easton, Bristol.

heroSubtitle: A calm, nurturing and child-led early years setting in Bristol BS5.

children.text: We provide a screen-free, home-from-home environment where children aged 0–4 years can explore, play and grow at their own pace.
Open year-round with funded places available.

childCentredFeature.title: Child-Centred
childCentredFeature.description: Learning inspired by curiosity and individual interests.

nurturingEnvironmentFeature.title: Nurturing Environment
nurturingEnvironmentFeature.description: A calm, loving space that feels like a second home.

children.text: Every child is unique and deserves an environment that celebrates their individuality. At Little Wise Kids, we combine structured learning opportunities with the freedom to play, imagine and discover.
Our educators build strong, trusting relationships with every family, ensuring children feel safe, understood and confident as they take their first steps into education.

screenFreeCard.title: Screen-Free Learning
screenFreeCard.description: We prioritise hands-on experiences, movement and real-world connection.

multilingualCard.title: Multilingual Exposure
multilingualCard.description: Gentle daily exposure to English and Portuguese.

nutritionCard.title: Wholesome Nutrition
nutritionCard.description: Freshly prepared meals that fuel active bodies and minds.

natureCard.title: Nature & Outdoors
natureCard.description: Daily outdoor adventures to explore the natural world.

communityCard.title: Community Focus
communityCard.description: Building strong partnerships with local families.

childLedCard.title: Child-Led Pace
childLedCard.description: Unhurried days that respect children's natural rhythms.

children.text: Choosing a nursery is a big decision. We invite you to visit Little Wise Kids, meet our team and experience our calm, welcoming environment.

testimonialQuote: “Little Wise Kids has been wonderful for our daughter. She has grown so much in confidence and comes home happy every day.”
faqIntro: Here are some of the common questions we receive from parents.

faqs.question: Do you offer funded childcare places?
faqs.answer: Yes, we accept 15 and 30 hours of government funding for eligible families.

faqs.question: What is your settling-in process?
faqs.answer: We offer a gentle, tailored settling-in period to ensure your child feels secure.

helpPanelCopy: If you have any other questions, our team is always here to help.
galleryIntro: A look at the meaningful moments that happen every day.

children.text: We are a small, dedicated team providing high-quality early years education in a nurturing environment.
Our approach is guided by the belief that children learn best when they are happy, secure, and actively engaged.
We are committed to providing a safe, inclusive, and stimulating environment.
Our setting is designed to feel like a home away from home.
Our programmes focus on developing key foundations for lifelong learning.
Our team of experienced educators is passionate about early childhood.
Guided by our experienced leadership team.

team.name: David Jones
team.bio: David is passionate about outdoor play.

children.text: We believe in the power of languages to connect us to the world.
Children absorb languages naturally when immersed in meaningful contexts.

childrenEnjoyHeading: Children at Little Wise Kids enjoy:
philosophyPoints: Hearing stories in English and Portuguese

children.text: Language is more than words; it's how we connect.
Our language programme integrates fully with the Early Years Foundation Stage.
We focus on real-world interactions rather than digital devices.

closingNote: Discover the world through language with us.

children.text: Details about our opening times and healthy meal provision.
We are open 51 weeks a year, Monday to Friday, from 7:30 am to 6:00 pm.

minAttendancePanelCopy: To support continuity, we require a minimum attendance of two full days per week.

children.text: We provide healthy, balanced meals and snacks.

chefNote: Our on-site chef creates meals that children love, packed with hidden vegetables.
typicalDayLead: While we follow a rhythm rather than a strict timetable, our days flow as follows:

welcomeAndFreePlay.description: A gentle start to the day with free play.

afternoonPlayAndHome.description: Afternoon snack, more play, and home time.

contactPanelCopy: Have questions about our hours or menu?

children.text: Everything you need to know about joining Little Wise Kids.
We support children through their transition to school.
Information about our fee structure and government funding options.
We accept 15 and 30 hours funding.

fundingExamples: Examples of funded patterns can be discussed during your visit.

children.text: We are here to help you navigate the funding application process.
We are registered for the Tax-Free Childcare scheme.
Our fees are inclusive of meals, snacks, and most activities.

subsidyFaqs.question: Do you charge top-up fees for funded hours?
subsidyFaqs.answer: We charge a small consumable fee to cover meals and resources.

children.text: We believe that strong partnerships with parents are vital.
We offer a gentle settling-in process tailored to your child.

partnershipText: Working together ensures a smooth transition.
policiesIntro: Important documents regarding our procedures and guidelines.
policiesSupportingNote: Printed copies are available upon request.

children.text: Take a look at the inspiring environment at Little Wise Kids.

galleryIntro: Capturing moments of joy, learning, and friendship.
finalCtaCopy: We would love to show you around in person.

children.text: We would love to hear from you.

messageIntro: Fill out the form below and we will get back to you shortly.

nextSteps.title: 1. We'll be in touch
nextSteps.description: Our manager will contact you within 48 hours.

nextSteps.title: 2. Arrange a visit
nextSteps.description: Come and see our setting in action.

nextSteps.title: 3. Registration
nextSteps.description: Complete the forms to secure your place.

confirmationParagraph: Thank you for getting in touch. A member of our team will review your message and reply as soon as possible.
nextStepsBody: Why not explore our recent updates or read about our approach to early learning?

children.text: Updates, parenting tips, and insights into early childhood education from our team.

latestArticlesIntro: Read our latest news and educational insights.
